name: lightning-yaml
description: A fast YAML parser — starting with a benchmark harness vs JSON and the leading JS YAML parsers.

scripts.bench:speed: node --expose-gc --import tsx bench/speed/parse.bench.ts && node --expose-gc --import tsx bench/speed/stringify.bench.ts
scripts.bench: pnpm gen:fixtures && pnpm bench:speed && pnpm bench:memory
